schedule.title: Opening Ceremony: The Future of AI
schedule.description: A deep dive into how generative models are reshaping our creative landscapes and ethical boundaries in 2024.

schedule.title: Sustainable Architecture
schedule.description: Designing living structures that coexist with nature rather than competing for its resources.
schedule.speaker: Mark Sterling, Chief Architect

schedule.title: Soulful Strings
schedule.description: A contemporary orchestral performance blending traditional instruments with electronic textures.
schedule.speaker: ACEEC Orchestra

schedule.title: Networking Lunch
schedule.description: Refreshments served in the Main Lounge. Connect with speakers and fellow attendees.

schedule.title: Humanity in the Digital Age
schedule.description: Reclaiming our focus and empathy in a world engineered for distraction.
schedule.speaker: Julian Vescovi, Philosopher & Author

footer.title: Don't miss out
